seo.title: Building Voice Agents with n8n AI Agents + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build voice agents with n8n AI Agents + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building Voice Agents with n8n AI Agents enables real-time conversational AI through speech-to-text, LLM reasoning, and text-to-speech pipelines. With sub-second latency requirements, these workflows demand robust guardrails to prevent failures like recursive loops, unsafe responses, or latency violations. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure response appropriateness, conversation coherence, and safety in production deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: Voice Agents Architecture with n8n AI Agents
architectureOverview.description:
n8n Voice Agents typically start with a Webhook or Voice Gateway trigger capturing real-time audio input. This feeds into a Speech-to-Text node (e.g., Deepgram or Whisper) converting audio to text. The transcribed text passes to an AI Agent node with tools for reasoning and action-taking, maintaining conversation memory via Memory Window nodes. The agent's response is validated, then converted to speech via Text-to-Speech (e.g., ElevenLabs) and streamed back. Sub-workflows handle tool calls and error recovery.

Latency is critical: STT (~200ms), LLM inference (~300ms), TTS (~150ms) must stay under 1s total. Memory nodes risk injecting stale context, while unvalidated AI outputs can trigger unsafe actions or infinite loops in tool chains. Vex integrates as a verification webhook post-AI Agent to catch these issues.

The workflow runs continuously, handling concurrent sessions with session IDs for state management.
architectureOverview.diagram:
Webhook/Voice Gateway → STT (Deepgram) → AI Agent (w/ Memory) → [VEX Guardrail] → TTS (ElevenLabs) → Voice Output
                          ↓
                     Tool Calls (Actions)

Session Memory ↔ AI Agent ↔ VEX Verification

risks.name: Workflow trigger chains causing recursive agent execution
risks.description: AI Agent outputs trigger sub-workflows that loop back to the main agent, exhausting resources
risks.mitigation: Vex recursion detector analyzes call stacks and session history before approving tool execution

risks.name: AI node outputs not validated before passing to action nodes
risks.description: Unfiltered LLM responses containing harmful instructions reach TTS or external APIs
risks.mitigation: Vex safety filtering and response appropriateness checks block dangerous content

risks.name: Credential exposure through agent tool call parameters
risks.description: AI Agent includes API keys or secrets in tool parameters visible in logs or TTS output
risks.mitigation: Vex PII/credential redaction scrubs sensitive data from tool calls and responses

risks.name: Memory window nodes injecting stale context into conversations
risks.description: Old conversation history confuses LLM, causing incoherent or hallucinated responses
risks.mitigation: Vex conversation coherence verification validates context relevance and recency

implementation.title: Real-time Latency Budget Verification
implementation.description: Verify end-to-end response stays under 800ms before TTS to maintain conversational flow

implementation.title: Response Appropriateness Check
implementation.description: Ensure AI response is contextually appropriate before TTS synthesis

implementation.title: Safety Filtering for Voice Output
implementation.description: Block harmful content from reaching TTS to prevent unsafe audio generation

implementation.title: Conversation Coherence Validation
implementation.description: Verify response maintains coherent conversation flow across memory window

vexIntegration.title: Add Vex Webhook After AI Agent Node
vexIntegration.description: Insert Vex verification as HTTP Request node immediately after AI Agent output

vexIntegration.title: Session Management with Vex
vexIntegration.description: Track conversation state across voice turns using Vex session IDs

vexIntegration.title: Error Recovery Workflow
vexIntegration.description: Handle Vex failures gracefully with fallback responses
